name: Identify and Measure the Five Brightest Stars in NGC 6652
description: Perform aperture photometry on the five brightest stars in the NGC 6652 F814W FITS image (~/AstroImages/ngc6652_project/ngc6652_814w.fits) using AstroImageJ. Save a ranked catalog to ~/AstroImages/ngc6652_project/bright_star_catalog.txt as a text table with columns: Rank, X_pixel, Y_pixel, and Integrated_Flux. Order the stars from brightest (rank 1) to faintest (rank 5) and ensure the coordinates reflect the centroid positions.
